data.content: Plan covers 7 changes across 3-5 files: (1) OpenAI→Codex rename in agent-identity.ts, (2) remove per-row Add/registered/Add All buttons, (3) show CLI path below agent name, (4) remove agent-id text before dropdown, (5) convert to multi-select with pill badges using Popover+Command pattern, (6) button color updates (success/success-light variants). State shape changes from Record<string,string> to Record<string,string[]> in hooks. Execution order: identity rename first, then hooks, then UI, then wiring. Main risk is multi-select consolidation — both Select and Combobox paths merge into one Popover+Command multi-toggle control.
